package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for gorm_preload_clause_associations_on_wide_graph: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Request-path GORM chains that use Preload(clause.Associations) or other broad preload graphs.
type CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphModel
}

type CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphService struct {
    repo *CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraph(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphDTO) error {
    focus := "gorm_preload_clause_associations_on"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    db.Preload("Orders.Items.Product").Joins("Owner").Find(&[]CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphModel{})
    db.Find(&[]CaseGormPreloadClauseAssociationsOnWideGraphModel{})
    gorm_preload_clause_associations_wide_positive := map[string]int{"gorm": 1, "preload": 2, "clause": 3, "associations": 4, "wide": 5, "graph": 6}
    gorm_preload_clause_associations_wide_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gorm_positive_0 := db.Where("gorm_id = ?", input)
    _ = gorm_positive_0
    preload_positive_1 := gorm_preload_clause_associations_wide_positive["preload"] + len(input)
    _ = preload_positive_1
    clause_positive_2 := gorm_preload_clause_associations_wide_positive["clause"] + len(input)
    _ = clause_positive_2
    associations_positive_3 := gorm_preload_clause_associations_wide_positive["associations"] + len(input)
    _ = associations_positive_3
    wide_positive_4 := gorm_preload_clause_associations_wide_positive["wide"] + len(input)
    _ = wide_positive_4
    graph_positive_5 := gorm_preload_clause_associations_wide_positive["graph"] + len(input)
    _ = graph_positive_5
    return nil
}
